input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.1.2
            TITLE: school name

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.1.2: School Name
VE.1.2 School Name 
Each vehicle must clearly display the school name.   
a. Abbreviations are allowed if unique and generally recognized 
b. The name must be in Roman characters minimum 50 mm high on both sides of the 
vehicle.  
c. The characters must be placed on a high contrast background in an easily visible location.  
d. The school name may also appear in non Roman characters, but the Roman character 
version must be uppermost on the sides.

final_answer: rule VE.1.2: School Name VE.1.2 School Name Each vehicle must clearly display the school name. a. Abbreviations are allowed if unique and generally recognized b. The name must be in Roman characters minimum 50 mm high on both sides of the vehicle. c. The characters must be placed on a high contrast background in an easily visible location. d. The school name may also appear in non Roman characters, but the Roman character version must be uppermost on the sides.
